title: problem with views reusing aliases ?
poc: create table x (n int, s varchar(10));
select s as a1, n as a2 from x;
key_bug_features: views reusing aliases in SQL queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE employees (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), salary DECIMAL(10, 2), department_id INT);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, salary, department_id) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 70000.00, 1);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, salary, department_id) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL, 2);
CREATE VIEW employee_salaries AS SELECT name AS employee_name, salary AS employee_salary FROM employees;
SELECT employee_name AS emp_name, employee_salary AS emp_salary FROM employee_salaries WHERE emp_salary IS NOT NULL;
